result.summary: Found 2 major issues: text truncation in the navigation bar and game card titles are cut off, indicating layout/overflow problems.

issues.description: Navigation menu item is truncated - shows 'Hot Gar' instead of the full text (likely 'Hot Games')
issues.suggestion: Adjust the container width or apply text wrapping to ensure full navigation item text is visible, or implement horizontal scrolling for the navigation menu

issues.description: Game card titles in the exclusive games section appear truncated or cut off (e.g., 'MAGNI' instead of full title, 'MUNGO' appears incomplete)
issues.suggestion: Increase the height of game card containers or reduce font size to accommodate full titles, or implement text wrapping for longer game names
